mapper.select: SELECT sido_code AS code, sido_name AS name FROM sidos ORDER BY sido_code
SELECT gugun_code AS code, gugun_name AS name FROM guguns WHERE sido_code = #{sidoCode} ORDER BY gugun_code

SELECT a.content_id AS contentId, a.title, a.addr1 AS address, COALESCE(ct.content_type_name, '') AS contentTypeName, a.overview, a.area_code AS areaCode, a.si_gun_gu_code AS sigunguCode FROM attractions a LEFT JOIN contenttypes ct ON ct.content_type_id = a.content_type_id WHERE a.title IS NOT NULL AND ( a.overview IS NOT NULL OR a.addr1 IS NOT NULL ) ORDER BY CASE WHEN a.overview IS NULL OR a.overview = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, a.title
LIMIT #{limit}
